_note: Homebrew species/lineage traits for flavour species not in the SRD (kender, aarakocra…), so a grounded character still gets its signature traits. Keyed by lower-cased lineage OR species name. Each value is a list of {name, text}. Merged ALONGSIDE the grounded SRD species' own traits (a kender keeps halfling traits AND gains these). Edition-shared.

kender.name: Fearless
kender.text: Kender are famously without fear. You can't be Frightened.

kender.name: Taunt
kender.text: As a Bonus Action, you needle and mock a creature within 60 feet that can see and hear you and understands at least one language. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw (DC 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier) or, until the end of its next turn, it has disadvantage on attack rolls against creatures other than you. You can taunt a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, regaining all uses on a long rest.

kender.name: Kender Curiosity
kender.text: Your insatiable, light-fingered curiosity grants you proficiency in one skill of your choice from Investigation, Sleight of Hand, or Insight — and a habit of 'finding' things in your pouches that you don't remember picking up.

aarakocra.name: Flight
aarakocra.text: You have a flying speed of 50 feet. To use this speed, you can't be wearing medium or heavy armor.

aarakocra.name: Talons
aarakocra.text: Your taloned feet are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. On a hit you deal 1d4 slashing damage, instead of the bludgeoning damage normal for an unarmed strike.
